name: RPlog_talk_Downtime_at_the_Tatooine_Jedi_School
title: Talk Page: Tatooine, Not Yavin IV
summary: This is an out-of-character wiki talk page for the Downtime at the Tatooine Jedi School log. Lolkje notes the log was recorded by a previous player of Leia and kept in her records. Danik Kreldin is surprised the school was on Tatooine rather than Yavin IV and resolves to fix the related article, while Lolkje points to the log's references to heat and desert as the telling clues distinguishing it from a possible separate Yavin IV school. The exchange is entirely editorial discussion of game continuity with no in-character content.
